true_desc_levels.1: Attacks an enemy.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Max Health</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>最大HP</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: 적을 공격합니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>최대 체력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: 攻击敌人。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>生命值上限</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。

true_desc_levels.1: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Taunted</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>の確率で対象を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>挑発</color>する。
true_desc_levels.1_zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>挑衅</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

true_desc_levels.5: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>60%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Taunted</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.

SKT_BURST_1.effect: Increases the chance to inflict Taunted by 30%

true_desc_levels.1_jp: 味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
true_desc_levels.1_zh: 使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
true_desc_levels.2: Increases all allies' <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>. Removes <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>debuff(s) from self on skill use</color>.
true_desc_levels.2_jp: 味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせる。自分の<color=#28d9ed>弱体効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1個</color>解除する。
true_desc_levels.2_kr: 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다. 자신에게 걸려 있는 <color=#28d9ed>약화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1개</color> 해제합니다.
true_desc_levels.2_zh: 使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。解除自身附带的<color=#28d9ed>1个</color><color=#28d9ed>弱化效果</color>。
true_desc_levels.3: Increases all allies' <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>. Removes <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>debuff(s) from self on skill use</color>.

2_jp: スキル使用時、弱体効果解除+1
2_kr: 스킬 사용 시 약화 효과 제거 +1
2_zh: 使用技能时解除弱化效果+1
4_zh: 防御力提升持续时间+1回合

true_desc_levels.1: <color=#ffd732>Chain Companion Effect</color>: After attacking, recovers <color=#28d9ed>25</color> Action Points.\n\n<color=#ffd732>Dual Attack Effect</color>: Damage increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Health</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: <color=#ffd732>チェーン効果(汎用)</color>:攻撃後、APを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>獲得する。\n\n<color=#ffd732>連携効果</color>:自分の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: <color=#ffd732>체인 컴패니언 효과</color> : 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>25</color>의 AP를 회복합니다.\n\n<color=#ffd732>협공 효과</color> : 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>이 높을수록 피해량이 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh:
<color=#ffd732>连携技能自由顺序效果</color>:攻击后,使AP恢复
<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。

<color=#ffd732>夹攻效果</color>:自身<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>越高,则伤害量越高。
